CustomField.formula: IF(FIND( "Why?", Survey_reason_for_cancelling__c,25 )=0, "", IF(FIND('","',Survey_reason_for_cancelling__c,FIND( "Why?", Survey_reason_for_cancelling__c,25 )+5 )=0, RIGHT(LEFT(Survey_reason_for_cancelling__c, LEN(Survey_reason_for_cancelling__c)-2), LEN(Survey_reason_for_cancelling__c)- FIND("Why?",Survey_reason_for_cancelling__c,25)-8) , RIGHT(LEFT(Survey_reason_for_cancelling__c , FIND('","',Survey_reason_for_cancelling__c,FIND( "Why?", Survey_reason_for_cancelling__c,25 )+10 )-2), FIND('","',Survey_reason_for_cancelling__c,FIND( "Why?", Survey_reason_for_cancelling__c, 25 )+10 )-FIND( "Why?", Survey_reason_for_cancelling__c, 25 )-8) ))
CustomField.label: CancellationSurvey WhyOther
